summary: REQ-1 appears implemented in the main header (theme toggle removed from App header). REQ-2 appears implemented by forcing the `dark` class in `index.html` early to avoid FOUC and ignore stored/system preference. REQ-3 is not clearly implemented; theme persistence/toggling logic and a ThemeToggle component still appear to exist per the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove or retire client-side theme persistence/toggling logic that is no longer needed after enforcing always-on dark styling.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff summary indicates theme state management with light/dark toggling and localStorage persistence still exists, and a ThemeToggle component still exists, which suggests theme toggling/persistence logic was not removed/retired.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed footer attribution link to caffeine.ai (and related UI branding).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; BuildRequest is only about removing theme toggle and enforcing always-on dark styling.

hallucinated_features.description: Added coffee icon branding in the header.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; BuildRequest scope is theming behavior/UI toggle removal.
